title: sorted CD4+ T cells from healthy donor, HD1
extract_protocol_ch1: 50,000 cells were loaded for capture on 10x Chromium system using the V3 single cell reagent kit for 3 prime RNA sequencing (10x Thechnologies). After capture and lysis, cDNAs from the cells were amplified as per 10x Chromium’s recommendations (10x Thechnologies. The amplified cDNAs were loaded on a single lane of NovaSeq 6000 for a depth of 50,000 reads per cell.
data_processing: Supplementary files format and content: Tab-separated values (barcodes.tsv.gz, features.tsv.gz, matrix.mtx.gz)
